response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development but lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on the Windows platform (5–10 years) required for the role. While they have experience with C and C++, their recent work heavily focuses on TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages, which does not align with the job's core technical requirements. Additionally, their domain expertise does not cover capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income systems.
strengths: Extensive software development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong problem-solving and software craftsmanship skills
Experience with low-latency systems and real-time data handling
concerns: Lacks the required 5–10 years of C++ development on Windows platform
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income systems
Recent work heavily focused on non-C++ technologies (TypeScript, Node.js)
